question: Approve the relnotes plan (4-milestone roadmap + M1 walking-skeleton PRD) and confirm the M1 build decisions: implementation stack, git access method, and range syntax?
options: Approve as-is with my recommendation: Go single static binary, shell out to the git binary, support A..B and bare-A (→HEAD) ranges for M1
Approve the plan but build in Python instead of Go (keep shell-out + same range syntax)
Approve the plan but change the git access method and/or range scope (specify)
Change the roadmap/M1 scope before I proceed (specify what)
answer: Approve the plan but build in Python instead of Go — keep shell-out to the git binary and the A..B / bare-A range syntax for M1. Proceed.

question: M1 planning is complete (spec + Gherkin + 10-step plan, all derived from the approved PRD). Approve the spec and plan so I can start implementing the walking skeleton?
options: Approve — implement M1 per the spec and plan (TDD, commit per step)
Approve with changes (specify what to adjust in the spec/plan first)
Hold — I want to review the spec/gherkin/plan and discuss before any code is written
answer: Approved — implement the walking skeleton per the spec.
